"""Declare API endpoints for videos with Django RestFramework viewsets."""

from django.conf import settings
from django.urls import include, path
from django.utils.module_loading import import_string
from rest_framework import routers

from marsha.core import models
from marsha.core.api import (
    DocumentViewSet,
    LiveSessionViewSet,
    OrganizationViewSet,
    PlaylistAccessViewSet,
    PortabilityResourceViewSet,
    SharedLiveMediaViewSet,
    ThumbnailViewSet,
    TimedTextTrackViewSet,
    UserViewSet,
    XAPIStatementView,
    get_frontend_configuration,
)


router = routers.DefaultRouter()
router.register(models.Video.RESOURCE_NAME, models.VideoViewSet, basename="videos")
router.register("documents", DocumentViewSet, basename="documents")
router.register("organizations", OrganizationViewSet, basename="organizations")
router.register("playlists", models.PlaylistViewSet, basename="playlists")
router.register(
    "playlist-accesses", PlaylistAccessViewSet, basename="playlist_accesses"
)
router.register(
     "portability-requests", PortabilityResourceViewSet, basename="portability_requests"
)
router.register("users", UserViewSet, basename="users")


# Video related resources (for nested routes)
video_related_router = routers.DefaultRouter()
video_related_router.register(
    models.LiveSession.RESOURCE_NAME, LiveSessionViewSet, basename="live_sessions"
)

video_related_router.register(
     "timed-text-tracks", TimedTextTrackViewSet, basename="timed_text_tracks"
)

video_related_router.register("thumbnails", ThumbnailViewSet, basename="thumbnails")


# Shared Live Media related resources (for nested routes)
sharedlivemedia_related_router = routers.DefaultRouter()
sharedlivemedia_related_router.register(
    models.SharedLiveMedia.RESOURCE_NAME,
    SharedLiveMediaViewSet,
    basename="shared-live-medias",
)


urlpatterns  = [
     path("", include((router.urls, "marsha"), namespace="api")),
     path("video/", include((video_related_router.urls, "video"))),
     path(
         "video/<uuid:video_id>/shared-live-media/",
         include((sharedlivemedia_related_router.urls, "video")),
     ),
]


if settings.BBB_ENABLED:
    urlpatterns  += [path("", include("marsha.bbb.urls"))]

if settings.DEPOSIT_ENABLED:
    urlpatterns  += [path("", include("marsha.deposit.urls"))]

if settings.MARKDOWN_ENABLED:
    urlpatterns  += [path("", include("marsha.markdown.urls"))]


if "dummy" in settings.STORAGE_BACKEND:
     urlpatterns  += [
         path(
             "e2e/api/video-upload/<uuid:uuid>",
             import_string(
                 f"{settings.DEFAULT_NAMESPACE}.api.dummy_video_upload"
             ),
            name="local-videos-storage-upload",
        ),
    ]

elif settings.STORAGE_BACKEND == "filesystem":
     urlpatterns  += [
         path(
             "api/videos-storage-upload/<uuid:uuid>/<str:stamp>/<str:model>",
             import_string(
                 f"{settings.DEFAULT_NAMESPACE}.api.local_videos_storage_upload"
             ),
            name="local-videos-storage-upload",
        ),
     ]
elif settings.STORAGE_BACKEND == "aws":
    urlpatterns  += [
         path("api/video-upload/<uuid:uuid>", import_string(f"{settings.DEFAULT_NAMESPACE}.api.video_upload"), name="local-videos-storage-upload")
     ]


urlpatterns  += [path("", include((router.urls, "marsha")))]

gold.description: Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes authors.
gold.main_flow: Admin opens authors | Admin creates or edits author | System saves Author | Admin can delete author

gold.description: Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes book categories.
gold.main_flow: Admin opens categories | Admin creates or edits category | System saves Category | Admin can delete category

gold.description: Admin lists, views, creates, updates, and deletes publishers.
gold.main_flow: Admin opens publishers | Admin creates or edits publisher | System saves Publisher | Admin can delete publisher

gold.description: Librarian creates, updates, deletes, lists, and retrieves books through REST API.
gold.main_flow: Librarian calls book API | System performs requested catalog operation | BookService persists or retrieves Book | API returns response

gold.description: Librarian registers a new library user.
gold.main_flow: Librarian submits user payload | System saves User | API returns created user

gold.description: Librarian retrieves the list of all users.
gold.main_flow: Librarian calls user list API | System loads users | API returns User list

gold.description: User borrows a book from the library.
gold.main_flow: User requests borrow endpoint | System links book to user | BookService updates borrowed state | API returns borrowed book response

gold.description: User returns a borrowed book.
gold.main_flow: User requests return endpoint | System clears borrowed state | BookService updates Book | API returns returned book response

gold.description: User retrieves a single book by id.
gold.main_flow: User calls book detail API | System loads Book | API returns book details

gold.description: Admin lists student records as JSON for a paginated table.
gold.main_flow: Admin opens student table | Client requests students page | System loads paginated Student list | System returns JSON response

gold.description: Admin checks whether a student name is valid and available before saving.
gold.main_flow: Admin enters student name | Client calls validation endpoint | System checks name format and uniqueness | System returns validation result

gold.description: Admin creates a new student record.
gold.main_flow: Admin submits student form | System validates Student with JSR303 | StudentService saves student | API returns success or validation errors

gold.description: Admin loads a student by id and updates that record.
gold.main_flow: Admin opens edit action | System loads student | Admin submits updated data | System updates Student

gold.description: Admin deletes one or multiple student records.
gold.main_flow: Admin selects one or more students | Client sends delete request | System deletes single or batch ids | API returns success

gold.description: Admin loads department records for student forms and filters.
gold.main_flow: Admin opens student form | Client requests departments | System retrieves Department list | System returns department options

gold.description: Admin views all student records on the list page.
gold.main_flow: Admin opens home page | System loads all students | System renders list view

gold.use_case_name: Open student create or edit form
gold.description: Admin opens the save page either to create a new student or edit an existing student.
gold.main_flow: Admin opens save page | System loads student by id when q is provided | System loads gender list | System renders save form

gold.description: Admin creates a new student or updates an existing student.
gold.main_flow: Admin submits student form | System checks whether id is empty | System adds or edits Student | System redirects to list

gold.description: Admin deletes a student record.
gold.main_flow: Admin selects delete | System receives student model | StudentService deletes record | System redirects to list
